description: A couple wants to book an oceanview cabin on a 7-night Caribbean cruise.

nodes.task_description: Search for available Caribbean cruises and check for oceanview cabin availability.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a suitable cruise with available oceanview cabins.

nodes.task_description: Provide the couple with the total price, including port fees and taxes.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gives a clear and accurate price breakdown.

nodes.task_description: Book the cruise cabin and process the deposit payment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates the cruise booking and provides a confirmation.
